=====Released=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lt. Surge
|pkmn=Zapdos
|type1=Electric
|type2=Flying
|img=Lt Surge Zapdos Adventures.png
|epnum=PS029
|epname=Go for the Golbat
|main=Legendary birds (Adventures)
|main_section=Zapdos
|desc={{p|Zapdos}} was used as an experiment from Team Rocket. He took control of it prior to ''[[PS030|Zap! Zap! Zapdos]]''. Around the end of the battle against Red, it ended up shocking Lt. Surge with its tremendous {{m|Thunder}} attack after [[Saur]]'s {{m|Razor Leaf}} tore up his insulating underwear, rendering it useless and nearly killing him. As a result, Red earned his Badge and stole his electric-proof gloves. While he was knocked out cold, Zapdos was called upon by [[Sabrina's Kadabra]] and was merged into {{DL|Legendary birds (Adventures)|Thu-Fi-Zer}}, the Rockets' ultimate creation. After its defeat, it flew away alongside its fellow [[legendary birds]] and was later recaught by {{adv|Green}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Lt. Surge
|pkmn=Raikou
|type1=Electric
|img=Lt Surge Raikou Adventures.png
|epnum=PS117
|epname=Slugging it out with Slugma
|main=Legendary beasts (Adventures)
|main_section=Raikou
|desc={{p|Raikou}} was partnered up with Lt. Surge in the battle against the [[Masked Man]]. After Surge was rendered inoperative by the villain, it partnered up with {{adv|Gold}} instead, and went back to the wild when everything had been resolved. Much later, it was recaught by [[Anabel]] in [[Johto]] and became her major powerhouse.}}
